log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Aetherborn — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aetherborn — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aetherborn — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Aetherborn — Iron Concentration HP: 53/67
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Aetherborn — Iron Concentration HP: 35/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Aetherborn — Iron Concentration --- HP: 35/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
